seo.title: Flooring Install Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your flooring business. Route unhappy customers to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Flooring Installation
hero.subheading: New floors feel normal once furniture is back. ReviewFlo asks after final walk-through when the sheen still impresses.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Flooring Installer Faces

items.heading: Flat, quiet rooms do not scream “review me”
items.body: Comfort feels like expectation, not a story.

items.heading: Height and transition fights turn emotional
items.body: Trim gaps and squeaks become public photos fast.

items.heading: Crews stack jobs back-to-back
items.body: Nobody pauses for marketing when the next house is waiting.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Flooring Installers

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after completion
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the job is signed off.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask at walk-through
items.body: Send when they approve transitions and cleanup.

items.heading: Private first for moisture or product issues
items.body: Warranty stress lands with you before stars.

items.heading: Retail and direct
items.body: Same flow whether you work for a showroom or your own brand.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, after remodels where rooms finally feel finished.
Private feedback helps you explain schedules before public blame.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Send to the manager who signed the punch list.
Customers review your service and communication, not the SKU.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Flooring Installation Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
